title: Claude Fable 5 vs Mythos 5 Epic Tech Poster AI Prompt
sourceTitle: Claude Fable 5 vs Mythos 5 Epic Tech Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Premium 4:5 technology editorial poster for Claude Fable 5 vs Claude Mythos 5, preserving the Anthropic Claude split-world mythic AI cover structure. Subject: Claude Fable 5 vs Claude Mythos 5 is presented as two opposing model worlds: safeguarded golden codex lab on the antique gold left side and frontier violet mythic research temple on the violet-magenta right side. Scene: Deep black cosmic technology space with golden stardust, nebula haze, refined ornamental lines, glass-like UI panels, and mythological AI-research atmosphere. Composition: Symmetrical vertical 4:5 split-screen cover with a luminous white-gold central axis, brilliant energy core at the middle, and two light streams forming an infinity symbol across the left and right halves. Signature Elements: Left world contains illuminated codex, judgment scales, shield-like safety symbols, code panels, sacred geometry, and mystical library fused with AI lab; right world contains Greek temple ruins, mythic staff-bearing silhouette, protein structures, cybersecurity grid lines, and supercomputing instruments. Style: Premium technology media cover with mythological epic atmosphere, cinematic AI-lab fantasy, ultra-detailed editorial layout, refined golden ornament, sacred geometry, futuristic research instruments, and luxurious black-gold/violet contrast. Color Palette: Fixed deep black cosmic base, antique gold, amber, and black-gold on the left; violet, indigo, electric magenta, and nebula glow on the right; white-gold central axis and energy core. Lighting: Cinematic high-contrast glow from the central energy core, radiant white-gold axis light, golden stardust bloom, violet nebula illumination, and crisp reflective highlights on glass panels. Typography: Clean English only with very little text: left title reads exactly CLAUDE / FABLE 5, right title reads exactly CLAUDE / MYTHOS 5 with clear spacing, and bottom tagline reads Safety becomes the interface. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
